title: DEERC 209E 1:10 Fast Brushless RC Car for Adults & Boys, 60+ KMH High Speed 4WD Off-Road Remote Control Truck with 2 x 3S Batteries & Extra Swing Arms, Hobby Grade Racing Car, RC Crawler Gift
features: Unleash True Brushless Power: Equipped with a Hobby-grade 2847 2300KV brushless high-torque motor paired with a waterproof 45A ESC (IPX4) for precise throttle response and rapid acceleration. The metal heatsink keeps performance cool under pressure, pushing this monster truck to thrilling 37+ MPH speeds. A wheelie bar adds stability and stunt capability for exciting high-speed launches.

Standout Design, Built to Impress: This larger 1:10 scale RC car dominates with its bigger build, fiercer style, and better performance. The custom graffiti body features a viper-skin pattern printed directly onto the shell for a head-turning look. Every detail is crafted for both style and strength, including an extra set of swing arms for worry-free bashing. Its premium finish and bold size make it a memorable gift for RC enthusiasts.

Engineered for Extreme Bashing Performance: Built for serious durability and control, this RC truck features front and rear metal-sheet chassis reinforcements for superior impact resistance. A 38T metal gear differential delivers strong traction, while the heavy-duty drivetrain and metal drive shafts ensure efficient power transfer. The adjustable 35-55 mm oil-filled shocks provide smooth, controlled damping over rough terrain, and a reinforced front bumper lets you attack obstacles with total confidence.

Precision 3-Wire Metal Servo Steering: Featuring a high-torque 3-wire metal-gear servo, the DEERC 209E remote control car delivers faster response, stronger steering power, and enhanced durability under impact. Enjoy accurate, proportional control at any speed—ideal for drifting, cornering, and tight maneuvers on all surfaces.

Supercharged Dual Battery Power: Powered by a 3S 11.1V 1500mAh battery with a strong 20C discharge rate, this rc crawler delivers consistent power and lightning-fast acceleration. Advanced stacking technology boosts energy density by 5% and extends lifespan by 10%. With two batteries included, you’ll enjoy up to 40 minutes of nonstop racing fun.

Anti-interfere Control on Any Terrain: Conquer all surfaces with true all-terrain capability and full proportional steering and throttle control. Smooth, responsive handling keeps you in command whether you’re racing, drifting, or climbing rough trails, delivering confidence and excitement with every run.
